name: Revolving cavern
hints: A revolving cavern - the exits may shift! Be careful mapping.
N leads to the prison cell. S leads to the narrow ledge over the acid pool.
D leads back to the tall room. This room connects the upper and lower pyramid.
Hub room in the lower pyramid. N=prison cell (19), S=ledge/acid pool (20), D=tall room (11).
notes: Revolving cavern hub. Exits may rotate. N=prison cell (19), S=narrow ledge (20), D=tall room (11).
